contradictions.spec_text:
Main trunk velocity: 1,800 FPM maximum
Branch velocity: 1,200 FPM maximum
Minimum duct size: 6 inches diameter

1.5 FIRE PROTECTION COORDINATION
HVAC ducts penetrating fire-rated assemblies shall have fire dampers per NFPA 90A. Smoke dampers required at all smoke barrier penetrations.
contradictions.drawing_text:
HVAC COORDINATION - ARCHITECTURAL
Mechanical room minimum ceiling height: 12 feet clear
All ceiling plenums shall be minimum 18 inches deep for duct routing
Diffuser locations coordinated with reflected ceiling plan A-201
Thermostat locations per electrical plan E-301

E. FIRE RATED ASSEMBLIES
All s
